_comment: Reference for manual domain updates. Gateway reads gateway/src/provider-config.ts and env vars at runtime.

animepahe.note: Cloudflare challenge — needs browser cookies or FlareSolverr; set ENABLE_ANIMEPAHE=true to attempt

animekai.note: Domain rotates — update ANIMEKAI_BASE_URL when a mirror is confirmed live

telegramPipeline: not integrated — rips flow Nyaa/fansubs → mirrors → embed sites we scrape
